name: Stardust Synchron
name_jp: スターダスト・シンクロン
desc: If this card is in your hand or GY: You can Tribute 1 monster; Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field, also, you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Synchro Monsters. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand that mentions "Stardust Dragon". You can only use each effect of "Stardust Synchron" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is in your hand or GY: You can Tribute 1 monster; Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field, also, you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Synchro Monsters. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand that mentions "Stardust Dragon". You can only use each effect of "Stardust Synchron" once per turn.
eff: If this card is in your hand or GY: You can Tribute 1 monster; Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field, also, you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Synchro Monsters. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand that mentions "Stardust Dragon". You can only use each effect of "Stardust Synchron" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
